mapper.select: SELECT ps.*, p.name AS product_name, p.code AS product_code, p.unit, p.alert_threshold, wl.code AS location_code, CASE WHEN ps.quantity <= p.alert_threshold THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS alert FROM product_stock ps JOIN product p ON ps.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN warehouse_location wl ON ps.location_id = wl.id ORDER BY ps.delivery_date ASC, ps.id
SELECT * FROM product_stock WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND location_id = #{locationId} LIMIT 1
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(quantity), 0) FROM product_stock WHERE product_id = #{productId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product_stock (product_id, location_id, quantity, production_date, expiry_date, delivery_date, last_inbound_time) VALUES (#{productId}, #{locationId}, #{quantity}, #{productionDate}, #{expiryDate}, #{deliveryDate}, #{lastInboundTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE product_stock SET quantity = quantity + #{quantity}, last_inbound_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND location_id = #{locationId}
